target: My sister wandering off somewhere on a whim is nothing new, but...
Why did she have to do that today of all days?
It's our birthday today... Jeez! I bet she completely forgot!
*Gulp, gulp...* I wonder if Sis brought anything to drink? What if she collapsed somewhere?
She's the type of person who forgets to breathe when she's focused on something...
Shinpei, I sense Haine's presence ahead.
At this rate, Ryunosuke is going to run into Haine!
This is bad... Ryunosuke!! It's dangerous that way!
I wonder what kind of person Sis's friend is. Or rather, why are they meeting in a place like this?
(Damn it, can he not hear me...?!)
Maybe this friend is a guy...
No, no, knowing Sis, there's no way. Yeah, definitely not.
Oh no...! He's heading right for Haine!
Damn it, at this rate they'll run right into each other!
Was I hearing things...? I could've sworn I heard someone say I'd be killed...
(I was able to interfere with the past?)
(No, there's no time to think about that right now! I need to keep Ryunosuke away from Haine!)
So please go back!! Get away from here quickly!!
Just my imagination... huh. Listening to all these cicadas must have messed with my hearing.
It's no use... He really can't hear us...
But it definitely reached him just a moment ago...!
A red... kimono? Who is that...?!
Is this the "friend" Sis told us about?
Was that voice from earlier this girl too...?
Are you okay? Um... are you feeling sick?
I don't want to do this anymore!!!
Ow... What was that for all of a sudden...?
What's with this kid... Those aren't the eyes of someone sane...
L-Let's just calm down, okay? Your kimono is covered in mud. Your mom's gonna be mad at you.
Can you stand by yourself? If not, I'll lend you a hand, so come on, let go.
I hate... being hungry... I hate it!!!
Aaaah! Let go!! Let me go!!
Shinpei, we have to do something!
I know! But there's nothing we can do...!
Wh-What the hell is with this kid...?
This is bad, this kid isn't normal. Right now, I have to run...
S-Stay away...! I said stay away from me!
This is bad! His legs are bleeding terribly...!
We have to help him quickly! Shinpei, I'm undoing the transformation for now!
It's no use! My attacks are going right through...!
(Even if the attacks don't hit, is Haine sensing their presence...?)
(We managed to stop her for a second, but that's not enough...!)
(Look at the big picture...! What can we do right now...)
(Nagumo-sensei knew the truth about how Ryunosuke was killed.)
(If she witnessed that scene with her own eyes, then right at this very moment, she should be heading this way...)
Ushio! Try to slow Haine down, even just a little!
I'll go call for Nagumo-sensei in the meantime!
You say that, but my attacks don't even hit her!
I can't be certain, but it seems Haine can sense your attacks!
We don't have time to explain or think!
Got it! I'll do what I can!
Nagumo-sensei, please hurry! Ryunosuke is being attacked by Haine...!
You're not hearing things! Nagumo-sensei, over here! Hurry this way!
I don't want to be hungry anymore!!!
Ryuno...suke? What's with all that blood...?
What... is going on here? Why did this happen...?
Don't, it's dangerous to get close to that monster!
Nagumo-sensei, run! At this rate, you'll be killed too!
Hurry up and get Ryunosuke out of there!
Hold on to me, Ryunosuke. We need to get out of here fast!
(Haine is acting strange. It's like she's trying to say something...)
(But right now, I'm more worried about Ryunosuke-san.)
